title: Host Cue
description: Live v1 host cue contract for product/script prompts that are allowed only inside Live Plan and Product Scope.
$comment: Sources: PACK-08, TECH-08, TECH-02, and TECH-04. Host cue must not cue out-of-scope SKU, sale-locked/recall-held SKU, unapproved claims, fake urgency/scarcity, or public order closing.

live_plan_id.description: Live Plan that authorizes this cue.

cue_type.description: Cue type. TODO: define official cue type enum.

cue_text.description: Cue text or summarized cue instruction.

sku_id.description: SKU referenced by cue, if any.

quote_snapshot_id.description: QuoteSnapshot reference if cue mentions final price.

product_recommendation_id.description: Product recommendation reference if cue is AI-generated.

public_safe.description: Whether cue is safe for public live context.

allowed_to_present.description: Whether host may present this cue.

no_fake_urgency.description: Invariant: cue must not create fake urgency/scarcity.
